_snapshot.source_of_truth: the LIVE OpenClaw dashboard (`cron.list`). This file is a periodically-regenerated MIRROR for human reference + drift-detection — it is NOT authoritative and is NOT auto-consumed by any code.
_snapshot.level: metadata mirror — schedule / timezone / session / timeout / model / payload-kind / sessionKey for every live job. It intentionally does NOT carry full UUIDs (8-char prefixes shown) or verbatim payload.message bodies; thin crons defer to the named SKILL (in git), fat crons carry inline prompts (authoritative copy in cron.list).
_snapshot.regen_procedure: 1) ask Alaska to dump `cron.list` (all jobs, all fields incl. sessionKey). 2) rebuild this file from it. 3) commit. REGENERATE AFTER ANY cron add/edit.
notes: Regenerated 2026-06-14 from a live cron.list dump. Drift vs the 2026-06-05 snapshot: old classifier 0814f554 DELETED → recreated clean as 81fe0a92 (no sessionKey); added Agent Memory Morning Review (79e0faaa) and the rogue Nilesh reminder (cb320e7c); W-1 daily (b25237a7) + the two ephemeral 'at' jobs (1ccbdd4e self-check, e7f37981 W-1 expiry) are gone (expired/self-deleted); several timeouts raised (W-2 300→600, Pre-Call Brief 240→600 + thinned, Meeting Intelligence 600→900).

SESSIONKEY: 21 of 25 jobs carry `sessionKey:"agent:main:main"` (or, for cb320e7c, a thread-scoped variant). This is PROVEN HARMLESS on isolated crons (A/B 2026-06-13: trivial cron WITH key = 2.4s vs WITHOUT = 3.2s; Event Pollers run 14-23s on the key all day). It does NOT load the main session. DO NOT mass-recreate these — the classifier's hang was data corruption, not the sessionKey. The 4 clean (no-sessionKey) jobs: e848ce6f, 81fe0a92, 79e0faaa, 04edf01e.

CLASSIFIER FIX (#170-#173, merged 2026-06-13): the corruption was at ingestion (no committed parser → model improvised a tab-split). Now committed parsers lib/ingest_messages.py + lib/write_classification.py (json.loads + bound params + NUL sanitizer) write intent_inbox; the classifier SKILL reads via json_object() and caps per-row output. 81fe0a92 verified at 10.2s/run.

W-2 (ec763489): timeout raised 300→600 as a STOPGAP. Root cause of its 150s→300s climb is output volume (its weekly signup table grows with the userbase), NOT the sessionKey — same output-explosion pattern as the classifier. Durable fix = assemble the table in code, not one model generation. Confirm on its next Monday run.

ROGUE: cb320e7c (Nilesh refactor-docs reminder, sessionTarget:main, thread-scoped key) has deleteAfterRun:true but has NOT self-deleted — it fires daily with stale content (deadline was 2026-06-10). PENDING DELETION (Abhinav's call on whether the underlying review is still wanted → if so, a real task, not a cron).

Post-upgrade model policy (OpenClaw 2026.5.28): default = anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6; Thinker pinned to opus-4-8; Watcher Janitor pinned to opus-4-7; several pinned to sonnet-4-6 (see jobs). No openai or retired-model pins.
